title: spec_scope_amended event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records a governed scope.in/scope.out/scope.support amendment made via `caws specs amend-scope` (CAWS-SCOPE-AMEND-COMMAND-001; support added by WORKTREE-SUPPORT-SCOPE-001). Replaces the prior chore-commit-only amendment path that rode in invisibly.

added_in.description: scope.in paths added by this amendment (may be empty).

removed_in.description: scope.in paths removed by this amendment (may be empty).

added_out.description: scope.out paths added by this amendment (may be empty).

removed_out.description: scope.out paths removed by this amendment (may be empty).

added_support.description: scope.support paths added by this amendment (may be empty).

removed_support.description: scope.support paths removed by this amendment (may be empty).

resulting_scope_in.description: The full scope.in after the amendment (non-empty per the spec schema).

resulting_scope_out.description: The full scope.out after the amendment.

resulting_scope_support.description: The full scope.support after the amendment (admitted-but-not-claimed paths).
